priceTiers.note: Shipped pack/card glow axis (src/lib/price-tier.ts) — six price tiers, common → immortal, bucketed by value. Supersedes the aspirational starter/silver/gold/diamond band for packs (DESIGN.md §5 Drop Board note). Feed rgba(<rgb>, a) for glows.

display.purpose: Screen titles, reveal moments, rank numerals, meaningful RM values.

shadows.name: rarity-glow
shadows.purpose: Colored glow inherited from a card's rarity, a tier's hue, or chase gold on a prize. Never decorative.

shadows.name: glass-panel-elevation
shadows.purpose: Exclusive to .glass-panel overlays (modals, sheets, toast): drop shadow + top/bottom rim highlights that sell the glass material. In-flow cards stay matte — this never appears on them.

glassSurfaces.name: glass-panel
glassSurfaces.note: backdrop-filter is applied at runtime by useLiquidGlass() (src/lib/use-liquid-glass.ts): SVG refraction on Chromium, preset-specific frosted fallbacks elsewhere (subtle 24px/1.4, accent 20px/1.5). Utility in globals.css.

glassSurfaces.name: glass-chrome
glassSurfaces.note: Wide chrome only (header, tab bar, banners, sticky bars) — refraction is capped at ~800px/side. @supports fallback bumps tint to 0.94 where backdrop-filter is unavailable.

glassSurfaces.name: glass-scrim
glassSurfaces.note: Full-screen overlay backdrops. Same @supports fallback as glass-chrome.

glassSurfaces.name: glass-stage
glassSurfaces.note: Stage light baked into modal dimmers (which are black/40) so the glass rim always has a gradient to bend, even over empty ink. Earned glow — barely-there by design.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and sheet slides.

motion.name: marquee-loop
motion.value: sp-scroll-x: translate3d(0,0,0) → translate3d(-50%,0,0); 30s linear infinite (home pulls marquee) / 100s (slot RECENT WINS bar)
motion.purpose: The one sanctioned moving band — a duplicated track slides half its width for a seamless data loop. Pauses on hover/press; reduced motion → static swipeable row (animation off, overflow-x auto). Keyframe in globals.css.

motion.name: slab-float
motion.purpose: Spotlight slab idle float on the home hero (Drop Board board 01), paired with a subtle scroll-linked tilt. Reduced motion: perfectly still, fully lit.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: tab bar hides, header nav appears

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one white pill per zone (Pill primitive, variant=primary). Thumb-height, full-width in sheets and sticky cards.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; width: 100%; background: #fafafa; color: #0a0a0a; border: none; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Graphite pill for the non-primary action beside a white pill (Pill primitive, variant=secondary).
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background: #262626; color: #fafafa; border: none; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #333333; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lowest-emphasis pill (Pill primitive, variant=ghost): hairline border on a faint white wash, for a tertiary action beside a primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #e5e5e5; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Filter/toggle chip; selected state inverts to white (90scard Daily/Weekly idiom).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #262626; color: #a3a3a3; border: none; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-chip:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-chip--selected { background: #fafafa; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Charcoal surface, hairline border, 16px radius. Matte — no drop shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #171717; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-label { margin: 0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #737373; } .ds-card-value { margin: 4px 0 0; font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 28px; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Balance Chip
components.description: Header wallet chip: balance (Nekst, Money Is Display) + white plus-disc opening the top-up sheet. 44px tap target, present on every screen.
components.css: .ds-balance { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 4px 4px 4px 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-balance:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); } .ds-balance-amt { color: #ffffff; font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-balance-plus { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fafafa; color: #0a0a0a; }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar
components.description: The five shipped destinations — Task · Ranks · Home · Vault · Me (src/components/app-shell/tabs.ts, Home center). All tabs uniform, no raised center tab. Active: Paper White; inactive #737373. Glass-chrome bar.
components.html: TaskRanksHomeVaultMe
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.5); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; height: 64px; color: #737373; text-decoration: none; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-tab--active { color: #fafafa; }

components.name: Sticky Stat Card
components.description: Anchored your-rank / totals card floating above the tab bar (90scard-derived signature).
components.html:
Your rankTo top 10
#458RM 29,701
components.css: .ds-statcard { background: #171717; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; } .ds-statcard-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; } .ds-statcard-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #737373; } .ds-statcard-value { font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 24px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-statcard-value--gold { color: #ffb020; }

components.name: Data Marquee
components.description: Drop Board seam (src/components/home/PullsMarquee.tsx): slim full-bleed band streaming REAL pulls — rarity dot, masked name, Nekst value, age. Duplicated track slides −50% for a seamless loop; pauses on hover/press; reduced motion → static swipeable row. The whole band is one link. Decorative word-loop marquees stay prohibited.
components.html: wan*** pulledRM 3,2002m agojay*** pulledRM 4805m agomei*** pulledRM 12,90011m ago
components.css: .ds-marquee { display: block; width: 100%; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: #171717; padding: 10px 0; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-marquee:hover { background: #262626; } .ds-marquee:hover .ds-marquee-track { animation-play-state: paused; } .ds-marquee-clip { overflow: hidden; } .ds-marquee-track { display: flex; width: max-content; gap: 32px; padding-right: 32px; animation: ds-scroll-x 30s linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-scroll-x { from { transform: translate3d(0,0,0); } to { transform: translate3d(-50%,0,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-marquee-track { animation: none; } .ds-marquee-clip { overflow-x: auto; } } .ds-marquee-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-marquee-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-marquee-who { font-size: 13px; color: #a3a3a3; } .ds-marquee-val { font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; color: #ffffff; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-marquee-age { font-size: 11px; color: #737373; }

components.name: Tier Ladder Row
components.description: Drop Board board 02 (src/components/home/TierShelf.tsx): one full-width rung per pack, price high→low, under a board lockup (ALL-CAPS Nekst head + quiet 'All packs →' link). As shipped: neutral art pedestal, name, TOP CHASE line in Chase Gold, price right-aligned in Nekst. Desktop: top rung spans full width, the rest two-up.
components.html:
RIP A PACK

All packs →
🂠Pokémon Elite PackTOP CHASE RM 12,900RM 199Rip it →
components.css: .ds-lockup { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-lockup-head { margin: 0; font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #ffffff; } .ds-lockup-link { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #a3a3a3; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-lockup-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-ladder-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 12px; background: #171717; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms, transform 120ms; } .ds-ladder-row:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .ds-ladder-row:active { transform: scale(0.99); } .ds-ladder-art { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 96px; height: 96px; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); font-size: 40px; } .ds-ladder-mid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-ladder-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: #ffffff; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-ladder-chase { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #a3a3a3; } .ds-ladder-chase b { color: #ffb020; font-weight: 600; } .ds-ladder-end { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-ladder-price { font-family: Nekst, ui-sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 24px; color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-ladder-cta { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #a3a3a3; }

narrative.overview: A collector in bed at 11pm, phone the only light in the room, deciding whether to rip one more pack. Near-black chrome that disappears, card art and tier color that glows out of it, money values that read instantly, and a thumb-reach bottom tab bar. Structure borrowed from 90scard and luka.game, rendered on Polycards's own dark neutral base. The home page is a six-board editorial scroll story (Drop Board): data marquee, spotlight slab, tier ladder — every moving band carries real signal.
keyCharacteristics: Dark tonal layering (ink → charcoal → graphite), zero decorative shadows
The card is the hero: chrome is monochrome; only cards, tiers, rarity, and money carry color
White pill CTAs on dark — one primary per zone
Nekst Black for headings, ranks, and RM values; Geist for everything else
Phone-first: bottom tab bar, ≥44px targets, sticky action cards

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Every non-neutral color must mean a tier, a rarity, money in, or danger. If a color is there 'for energy', delete it.

rules.name: The Money Is Display Rule
rules.body: RM values that matter are set in Nekst Black — money is content, not metadata.

rules.name: The Glow Is Earned Rule
rules.body: A glow appears only when its color is inherited from the thing glowing. Decorative ambient shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do keep chrome monochrome: ink/charcoal/graphite/white everywhere a color isn't a signal
Do set meaningful RM values in Nekst Black; Buyback Green for money-in, Chase Gold for prizes
Do give every interactive element default, press, focus-visible, disabled, and loading states
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every animation
Do keep tap targets ≥44px with primary CTAs in thumb reach
Do use skeletons shaped like the content (card tiles, list rows) for loading
donts: Don't ship cheap gacha/casino energy: no slot-machine neon, coin showers, fire splash screens, or fake urgency timers
Don't drift to corporate SaaS blue-gray or dashboard-template grids
Don't touch web3/NFT purple degen gradients or glossy 3D coins
Don't build a generic e-commerce product grid
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, or decorative grid/stripe backgrounds — data marquees (Drop Board) are the one sanctioned moving band; decorative word loops stay banned

Don't invent new translucent surfaces: liquid glass only via the three .glass-* roles (panel/chrome/scrim) on floating surfaces; in-flow cards stay matte charcoal; slab tier frame and PrizeReveal stay glass-free (refraction there was tried and rejected 2026-07)
Don't put body text below #a3a3a3 on dark surfaces
Don't round containers past 16px or add drop shadows to buttons/cards
